answer:
There is no official LinkedIn-provided MCP server; however, several open-source implementations exist to connect AI agents like Claude to the LinkedIn Marketing API [1][2].

These servers generally fall into two categories:

Read-only tools: Focused on performance reporting, analytics, and campaign listing. Examples include flin-linkedin-ads-mcp [3] and Insightful Pipe’s server [2].

Read/Write tools: Support campaign creation, status updates, and budgeting. Examples include mharnett/mcp-linkedin-ads [4], Nuraveda-Labs/linkedin-ads-mcp [1], and the multi-platform ads-mcp [5].

Most implementations require a LinkedIn Developer account for OAuth credentials [4][2][5], though hosted options like Mesh Pilot provide pre-approved access [1][6].
